entry.title: Lovable
entry.description: AI app builder for generating and iterating on web applications from natural language product requests.
entry.seoTitle: Lovable AI app builder for web products
entry.seoDescription: Lovable helps teams generate and iterate on web applications from natural language product and design requests. HeyClaude adds source links, install steps,...
entry.author: Lovable
entry.cardDescription: AI app builder for prompt-driven web products.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Lovable fits product teams that want rapid web app scaffolding and AI-driven iteration before deeper engineering hardening.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
